description_long: This object is a computer motherboard assembly featuring a prominent MSI graphics card and a HyperX Fury DDR4 RAM module. The graphics card is large, with a black and blue shroud, a central cooling fan, and visible branding. The motherboard is populated with various ports, including USB, audio, and network interfaces, as well as multiple expansion slots and capacitors. The RAM module is black with white branding and is installed in one of the motherboard's DIMM slots. The assembly includes visible heatsinks, connectors, and a CPU socket at the center of the motherboard. The rear I/O panel is equipped with a range of ports for connectivity, and the overall construction is primarily metal and plastic with some electronic components.
description: A computer motherboard assembly with an MSI graphics card, HyperX Fury RAM, and various ports and connectors. The object features a mix of black, blue, and red components with visible branding.
description_view_0: The view highlights the front of the MSI graphics card with its cooling fan and blue accents.
description_view_1: This side view shows the HyperX Fury RAM module and the length of the graphics card, as well as the motherboard's expansion slots.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the backplate of the graphics card, the CPU socket, and the arrangement of capacitors and connectors on the motherboard.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the motherboard's rear I/O panel, displaying USB, audio, and network ports, along with the side of the graphics card.
